title: Dédé
writer: Jacques Bousquet, Jean Boyer, Albert Willemetz
actors: Albert Préjean, Danielle Darrieux, Mireille Perrey
plot: Dedê is a young wealthy man who buys a shoe store, owned by his friend Robert, in order to receive more conveniently his mistress. Everything seems fine and Dedê seems to be enjoying all of this. But the man barely knew that he wo...
